zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Blake於1494年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾時，她的父親Sir John Blake49歲，母親Eveline Skerrett19歲。她於大約1519年與Sir John  Allga Porter I在英國英格蘭艾可費爾斯泰德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1540年在英國艾可費爾斯泰德享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Blake于1494年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾时，她的父亲Sir John Blake49岁，母亲Eveline Skerrett19岁。她于大约1519年与Sir John  Allga Porter I在英国英格兰艾可費爾斯泰德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1540年在英国艾可費爾斯泰德享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Blake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (England and central Scotland): variant of Black 1, meaning ‘swarthy’ or ‘dark-haired’, from a byform of the Old English adjective blæc, blac ‘black’, with change of vowel length.

English: nickname from Middle English blak(e) (Old English blāc) ‘wan, pale, white, fair’. In Middle English the two words blac and blāc, with opposite meanings, fell together as Middle English blake. In the absence of independent evidence as to whether the person referred to was dark or fair, it is now impossible to tell which sense was originally meant.
English (Norfolk): nickname from Middle English bleik, blaik>, blek(e) (Old Norse bleikr) ‘pale or sallow’ (in complexion).

variants.name: Bleak
meanings: English: mostly a variant of   Blake  , but perhaps also of   Blick  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Black
meanings: English and Scottish: chiefly from Middle English blak(e) ‘black’ (Old English blæc, blaca), a nickname given from the earliest times to a swarthy or dark-haired man. However, Middle English blac also meant ‘pale, wan’, a reflex of Old English blāc ‘pale, white’ with a shortened vowel. Compare Blatch and Blick . With rare exceptions it is impossible to disambiguate these antithetical senses in Middle English surnames. The same difficulty arises with Blake and Block .
Scottish: in Gaelic-speaking areas this name was adopted as a translation of the epithet dubh ‘dark, black-(haired)’, or of various other names based on Gaelic dubh ‘black’, see Duff .

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames directly or indirectly derived from the adjective meaning ‘black, dark’, for example German and Jewish Schwarz and Slavic surnames beginning with Čern-, Chern- (see Chern and Cherne ), Chorn-, Crn- or Czern-.

variants.name: Blaikie
meanings: Scottish: nickname from a pet form of   Blake  .

variants.name: Blakes
meanings: English: variant of Blake , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: Of uncertain origin. If not simply an invention, it may have been devised as a feminine equivalent of   Alan   (of which it is an anagram), or a shortened form of   Alana .  It seems to have been first used by the American film actress  Lana Turner  (  1920–1995 ), whose original name was  Julia .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Blake was born in 1494, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Blake, was 49 and her mother, Eveline Skerrett, was 19. She married Sir John  Allga Porter I about 1519, in Felsted, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1540, in Felsted, Essex, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Blake est née en 1494, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Blake, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Eveline Skerrett, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John  Allga Porter I environ 1519, à Felsted, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1540, à Felsted, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Blake 1494 in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Blake 49 und ihre Mutter Eveline Skerrett 19. Sie hat um 1519 in Felsted, Essex, England, United Kingdom Sir John  Allga Porter I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1540 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Felsted, Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Blake è nata il nel 1494 nel Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Blake, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Eveline Skerrett, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Sir John  Allga Porter I circa 1519, nel Felsted, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1540, nel Felsted, Essex, England, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Blakeが1494年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Blakeは49歳，母Eveline Skerrettは19歳であった。約1519年にイギリスイギリスエセックスフエルステドでSir John  Allga Porter Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1540年にイギリスエセックスフエルステドで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Blake(이)가 1494년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Blake(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eveline Skerrett(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1519년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 프스테드에서 Sir John  Allga Porter I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1540년 영국 에세스 프스테드에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Blake nasceu em 1494, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Blake, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Eveline Skerrett, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John  Allga Porter I aproximadamente 1519, em Felsted, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1540, em Felsted, Essex, Inglaterra, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Blake родилась в 1494 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Blake было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Eveline Skerrett, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John  Allga Porter I около 1519 г. в местности фелстед, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1540 г. в местности фелстед, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret Blake nació en 1494, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Blake, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Eveline Skerrett, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Sir John  Allga Porter I aproximadamente 1519, en Felsted, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1540, en Felsted, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años.
